## Summary

Two-layer defense preventing incomplete evaluations from reaching users. Layer 1 blocks incomplete artifacts at the pipeline level before persistence. Layer 2 validates download content matches the web page before serving any file.

## Scope

**Touched:**
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/templateCompletenessGate.ts` (NEW) — pipeline completeness validation + support alert email
- `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — wires completeness gate before `persistEvaluationResultV2()`
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass3Synthesis.ts` — recommendation backfill from rationale + type imports
- `app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` — download parity gate + rendering defense + CSS escape fix
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — "Quality Review in Progress" UI for completeness failures
- `components/reports/DownloadReportButton.tsx` — fetch-based downloads with error message display

**Out of scope:** Template document changes, evaluation pipeline synthesis logic rewrite, CMS prose quality checks.

## Tests Updated

No new test files — the gate is a pure function (`validateTemplateCompleteness`) that's straightforward to unit test. The download parity gate is a private function within the route. Both are structurally validated by TypeScript (zero errors).

## Visual Evidence

N/A — UI change is conditional state display (quality-review blue panel appears only when template completeness gate fires). Download error banner appears only on parity failure.

## Accessibility

Download error message uses semantic HTML (`<p>` in amber banner with dismiss button). Quality review panel uses appropriate color contrast (blue-900 on blue-50).

## Browser Targets

N/A — standard React/Next.js rendering, no browser-specific APIs beyond `fetch` and `URL.createObjectURL`.

## CI/Infra Scope

N/A — no CI/infra changes.

## Rollback Plan

Revert this commit. The completeness gate is additive — reverting restores the previous behavior where incomplete artifacts are persisted without validation.

## Affected Workflows

Evaluation pipeline: adds a validation step between quality gate V2 and artifact persistence. If the gate rejects, the job fails with a user-friendly message instead of persisting an incomplete artifact.

Download flow: adds a pre-flight check before generating any download file.

## Schema Diff

N/A — no schema changes.

## Data Backfill

N/A — no backfill.

## Rollback Posture

N/A — no migration.

## Lock / Table-Scan Risk

N/A — no migration.

## Data Backfill Risk

N/A — no backfill.

## RLS / Access Impact

N/A — no RLS changes.

## Production Verification Query

N/A — no schema changes.

## Unauthorized Input Sources

Pipeline gate reads from the evaluation result object (internal pipeline data, never user-supplied). Download parity gate reads from the persisted artifact (already validated by the pipeline). No new external input surfaces.

## Internal Process Leakage

Support alert emails are sent only to `support@revisiongrade.com` (internal). User-facing messages say "quality issue detected" without exposing violation codes or internal diagnostics. Download error mentions print-to-PDF workaround only.

## Input → Action → Output

**Pipeline gate:** Evaluation result → `validateTemplateCompleteness()` → pass (persist) or fail (mark failed + email support + show quality-review UI)

**Download gate:** Evaluation artifact → `validateDownloadParity()` → pass (serve file) or fail (return user-friendly error with print-to-PDF instructions)

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

User sees "Quality Review in Progress" (blue panel) — no internal codes exposed. Download failure shows actionable workaround message.

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

Adds ~1ms synchronous validation step before persistence. No additional API calls unless the gate fails (then one Resend email).

## Latency Impact

Negligible — `validateTemplateCompleteness()` is a synchronous loop over 13 criteria checking field presence. No I/O.

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: no

Pass selection (check exactly one):

- [ ] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [x] Pass 3

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

Process-Change Impact Summary (required when Process Change: yes):

- N/A — process-change summary not required because Process Change is set to no.

## Contract Integrity

Template completeness gate validates the evaluation artifact against the short-form evaluation template's structural contract (density floors, required fields, section presence). This enforces the existing contract rather than modifying it.

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence.

Adds enforcement infrastructure only — no changes to LLM prompts, synthesis logic, or scoring.

## Quality Gate / Anomalies

QG_none — this PR adds a new deterministic gate (template completeness) that runs after existing quality gates. No anomalies.

## Risk

Low — additive validation gate. Worst case: gate is too strict and rejects valid artifacts → job fails with quality-review message → support is alerted → can be relaxed by adjusting thresholds. No data loss path.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Gate strictness: if the LLM consistently fails to populate all required fields, the gate will block all evaluations. Mitigation: violations are logged with codes, thresholds can be tuned, and the pipeline backfill (`synthesizeRecommendationsFromRationale`) runs before the gate to fill gaps.
- Email delivery: if `RESEND_API_KEY` is not set, alert emails are suppressed (logged only). The gate still blocks the artifact — support just won't get the email.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: false — adds a template completeness validation gate after Pass 3 synthesis and before artifact persistence.
